creator: devin.teske@fisglobal.com
text:
Another plan that I have in-motion is to [eventually] MFC bsdconfig to 9.x.

Since bsdconfig is all about resurrecting sysinstall's post-install capabil=
ities (package management included), the lay-of-the-land in 9.x should be:

sysinstall is for legacy package management
bsdconfig is for pkgng-based package management

We should re-evaluate this PR whence bsdconfig is MFC'd to a 9 release as I=
 suspect it will fill the need/requirements of this PR.
--=20
Devin

NOTE: bsdconfig is already in HEAD and you can play with it -- but you need=
 WITH_BSDCONFIG in src.conf(5) (alternatively, if you have the source check=
ed out, you can simply cd to usr.sbin/bsdconfig and say "make all install" =
to get started with bsdconfig(8) immediately).
